titleStmt.title: SII 26.197: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 197. (A.R. No. 185 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the deity Ādi-Chaṇḍēśura. It pertains to the matter of colonising from the 8th year in the reign of the king of the village of Śēvūr alias Śembiyan-kiḻāṇaḍinallūr in Vaḍapariśāra-nāḍu, a dēvadāna of the deity Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyār, but owned by the ūr and the urāḷis of the village. It also records that in the next year (i.e., the 9th year in the reign of the king) the village people themselves would enjoy the lands; but from the year after that (i.e., from the 10th year), the villagers should pay paddy and several other taxes (specified), besides 10 achchu of money annually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
taṇṭecuraṉ Ōlai tāparañcūḻvaiyakattuḷ kaṇṭa
karumamārāyka paṇṭeyaṟañ ceytāṉ ceytāṉaṟaṅkā
ttāṉ pātam tiṟampāmaṟ cenṉimel vaittu Āticaṇṭecura Āte
cam vaṭaparicāranāṭṭil cevūrāṉa cempiyaṉkiḻāṉaṭinallūr
Ūrum Ūrāḷikaḷukkum nāyaṉā(ā)r Avināciyāḷuṭaiyār te
vatāṉamāyt taṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa cempiyaṉkiḻāṉaṭinal
lūr śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟki yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu paṅku
ṉi mātamutal kuṭiyeṟṟuvatākavum Ēṟṟumiṭattu yitan
Etirāmāṇṭu Iṟai ṭum Uṇpārkaḷākavum yita
n Etirāmāṇṭu mutal kār ḷa kalamum meliṟai kiḻi
ṟai Oṭṭac cuntavari Ēlavai Ukavai tirumun kāṭci U
ppāyam veṇṭu kuṟṟateṇṭam puṟa Aṭal kiḻiṟai
ciṟṟāyam taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭārpāṭṭam yiḻam puṉcey
pāṟaikkāṇa toloṭṭu tiruccūlavari tiruvācal viṉi
yokam cumai cuṅkañ cā kai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum
Āṇṭoṉṟukkup pattaccum kāṉattāl
nelirupatiṉ kalamum Āṇṭutoṟum Iṟuppā
rkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavarai celvatākavum Ippaṭikku Ātittaṇṭe
Digital edition of SII 26.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
